CreateAlarmPolicy.name: Policy name
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.type: Target type, options: ALL_INSTANCES / INSTANCES / TAGS / INSTANCE_GROUPS
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.instances: Required when type=INSTANCES; list of alarm instances
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.region: Required when type=INSTANCES; region of the instances
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.tags: Required when type=TAGS; list of alarm instance tags
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.instanceGroups: Required when type=INSTANCE_GROUPS; list of instance group IDs
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.includingDimensions: List of dimensions that must be included
CreateAlarmPolicy.target.excludingDimensions: List of dimensions that must be excluded
CreateAlarmPolicy.rules.conditions: List of conditions within a rule (AND logic)
CreateAlarmPolicy.rules.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger count; must be greater than 0
CreateAlarmPolicy.rules.checkIntervalSeconds: Check interval in seconds; must be greater than 0
CreateAlarmPolicy.rules.content: Description of alarm condition (returned in query response only)
CreateAlarmPolicy.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger threshold; must be greater than 0
CreateAlarmPolicy.onMissingData: Handling for missing data, options: IGNORE / SHOW_NO_DATA_AND_NOTIFY / SHOW_OK
CreateAlarmPolicy.noDataNotifyPendingMinutes: No-data determination interval in minutes; required when onMissingData is not IGNORE
CreateAlarmPolicy.type: Policy type, options: APP / SITE / CLOUD / CUSTOM
CreateAlarmPolicy.level: Alarm severity level, options: NOTICE / WARNING / MAJOR / CRITICAL
CreateAlarmPolicy.renotifyCount: Maximum number of repeated alarm notifications; 0 means disabled
CreateAlarmPolicy.renotifyIntervalMinutes: Repeated notification interval in minutes; required when renotifyCount > 0
CreateAlarmPolicy.notifyMergeWindowSeconds: Notification merge window in seconds; 0 means disabled
